mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, template_id, field_name, role_name, user_id, can_view_sensitive, can_edit, can_export, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM form_field_permission WHERE (tenant_id = #{tenantId}) AND (template_id = #{templateId} OR template_id IS NULL) AND (field_name = #{fieldName} OR field_name IS NULL) ORDER BY CASE WHEN template_id IS NOT NULL AND field_name IS NOT NULL THEN 0 WHEN template_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 2 END
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO form_field_permission ( tenant_id, template_id, field_name, role_name, user_id, can_view_sensitive, can_edit, can_export, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{templateId}, #{fieldName}, #{roleName}, #{userId}, #{canViewSensitive}, #{canEdit}, #{canExport}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE form_field_permission SET can_view_sensitive = #{canViewSensitive}, can_edit = #{canEdit}, can_export = #{canExport}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
